data.body:
[12/30 (Tue) Ban Notice]

We have taken disciplinary actions against the players who were abusing the in-game system in Total/Grand Assault.

▶ Total number of players banned: 11
▶ Period: Permanent
▶ More details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3220&thread=3329316
